message:
feat(messaging): fabric discovery sessions, operator intent compiler, recoverable service capsules, IR monotone normalization, counterfactual promotion evaluation, and redis event dedup

Messaging subsystem expansion across 10 files (+1 new integration test):

fabric.rs — Full typed discovery session system: DiscoveryBootstrap,
DiscoveryAdmissionCredential, DiscoveryHello, DiscoveryNegotiationPolicy,
DiscoverySession with capability-scoped interest blinding, steward-lease
authority validation against control epochs, membership-epoch consistency
checks, and pattern-covers-pattern matching. ~760 lines of implementation
plus ~500 lines of tests covering handshake, escalation rejection, interest
blinding, sybil resistance, stale lease filtering, authority epoch mismatch,
conflicting leases, replay determinism, and monotonic appends.

policy.rs — OperatorIntentCompiler that transforms narrow OperatorIntent
into explicit CompiledOperatorIntent artifacts: SovereigntyMode,
MobilityPreference, CrossTenantTrafficPolicy, EgressBudget/EgressBudgetMode,
MobilityBudget, FederationConstraints, ControlCapsulePolicy,
PromotionApproval, PromotionEvidence, ViolationResponse. Compiler maps
intent combinations to service classes, safety envelopes, delivery policies,
degradation policies, mobility budgets, federation constraints, and
control-capsule rules. ~600 lines plus ~140 lines of tests.

snapshot.rs — Full recoverable service-capsule system replacing a 6-line
stub: CapsuleStateDigest, EvidenceDigest, ServiceCapsuleState,
RecoverableServiceCapsule, ServiceCapsuleRestorePlan, RestoredServiceCapsule,
ServiceCapsuleError. Capture/hibernate/plan_restore/resume lifecycle with
key-hierarchy binding validation, consumer-state digest, evidence frontier
canonicalization, and deterministic capsule digest. ~835 lines plus ~280
lines of tests.

ir.rs — Monotone normalization for LatencyEstimate, CpuEstimate,
ByteEstimate, DurationEstimate constructors that raise fields to maintain
ordering invariants. Added serde(from) deserialization normalization via
Raw* intermediate structs. ~170 lines of tests.

cut.rs — CounterfactualPromotionDecision evaluation: evaluate_promotion()
on RehearsalComparison with CounterfactualScore, envelope validation for
NaN/infinite scores, temperature ranking, steward/repair-depth/witness
checks. ~550 lines total.

explain.rs — Fixed test helper test_audit_entry so expected_loss_by_action
keys match the actual action parameter instead of always being allow/deny.

mod.rs — Added pub mod snapshot, expanded pub use re-exports for new
policy types and snapshot types.

privacy.rs — Changed CellKeyHierarchySpec::validate from fn to pub(crate)
fn (needed by snapshot module).

service.rs — Added MaxEvidenceBelowAlertThreshold validation for e-process
contracts (max_evidence must >= 1/alpha threshold). Extracted quantitative
helpers. Updated test config and added threshold validation tests.

redis.rs — Extracted push_pending_event() with single MAX_PENDING_EVENTS
= 4096 cap, replacing duplicated inline caps in 4 call sites and the
separate MAX_PING_BUFFERED constant.

tests/fabric_replay_scenarios.rs — New integration test for replayable
FABRIC scenarios under LabRuntime and DPOR explorer.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
